name: winserve-care-ai-optimiser
description: AI Care Operations Optimiser — domiciliary care route optimisation prototype

scripts.install:all: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
